channel.title: Academia on Hywel Stoakes
channel.description: Recent content in Academia on Hywel Stoakes

item.title: A New Home
item.description: I have recently moved institution and moved country to join a project researching pronunciation in Te Reo Māori at the University of Auckland in New Zealand. The outcome will be an app that helps a speaker become more confident and fluent with their pronunciation of Te Reo. So I thought I should update my website and maybe give it a new home too. This is work in progress, as all my projects seem to be.
